mapper.select:
select count(1) from ( select count(1) from notice_topic left join notice_topic_tmpl_rel on notice_topic_tmpl_rel.notice_topic_id = notice_topic.id left join notice_tmpl on notice_topic_tmpl_rel.notice_tmpl_id = notice_tmpl.id left join notice_protocol on notice_protocol.id = notice_tmpl.notice_protocol_id left join notice_topic_range on notice_topic_range.notice_topic_id = notice_topic.id
notice_topic.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
notice_topic.code like concat('%',#{code},'%')
notice_tmpl.name like concat('%',#{templateName},'%')
and notice_topic.notice_topic_type_id = #{topicTree}
notice_protocol.id = #{protocolId}
group by notice_topic.id, notice_topic.name, notice_topic.code ) a
